name: Google Cloud AI Platform (Vertex AI Python SDK)
pricing_notes: Per prediction call; training on managed GPU/TPU at standard GCP rates

auth.notes: google-auth Application Default Credentials or service account JSON

performance.notes: GCP regional endpoints; online prediction sub-second; batch prediction async

agent_readiness.notes: Vertex AI SDK for model training, deployment, and Gemini access. import vertexai. from vertexai.generative_models import GenerativeModel. vertexai.init(project='my-project', location='us-central1'). model = GenerativeModel('gemini-1.5-pro'). response = model.generate_content('Hello'). Training: CustomTrainingJob. AutoML: AutoMLTabularTrainingJob. Model registry: aiplatform.Model.upload(). Endpoints: model.deploy(endpoint). Batch prediction: model.batch_predict(). Pipeline: PipelineJob. Feature Store. Vector Search (ANN). Evaluation. Also provides openai-compatible API via Vertex AI Model Garden.

gotchas: vertexai and google-cloud-aiplatform are two entry points to the same package — confusing
Region must be explicitly set (not all features available in all regions)
Gemini via Vertex AI has different quotas than google-generativeai SDK
Training jobs require Google Cloud Storage bucket for artifacts
best_when: Gemini access with enterprise SLAs and VPC-SC security controls
End-to-end MLOps: training, evaluation, deployment, monitoring on GCP
AutoML for tabular data without custom model code
Organizations standardized on GCP requiring Vertex AI pipeline integration
avoid_when: Simple Gemini API calls (use google-generativeai SDK instead)
Teams without GCP expertise or budget
summary: Google Cloud AI Platform SDK (Vertex AI) for GCP MLOps and Gemini access. vertexai.init(project, location). GenerativeModel('gemini-1.5-pro').generate_content(). CustomTrainingJob, AutoMLTabularTrainingJob, model.deploy(), model.batch_predict(). Feature Store, Vector Search, Pipeline. Enterprise Gemini with VPC-SC and audit logging. For simple Gemini calls use google-generativeai instead. Best for GCP organizations needing enterprise MLOps with Gemini integration.
